'''lorajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylometric|xylometric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylometric|xylometric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lorajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lorajithi|lorajithi]] || [[word:lorajiji|lorajiji]] || [[word:lorajishi|lorajishi]] || [[word:lorajiki|lorajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lorajuthuthu|lorajuthuthu]] || [[word:lorajujuju|lorajujuju]] || [[word:lorajushushu|lorajushushu]] || [[word:lorajukuku|lorajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lorajuthu|lorajuthu]] || [[word:lorajuju|lorajuju]] || [[word:lorajushu|lorajushu]] || [[word:lorajuku|lorajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lorajufthuf|lorajufthuf]] || [[word:lorajufjuf|lorajufjuf]] || [[word:lorajufshuf|lorajufshuf]] || [[word:lorajufkuf|lorajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lorajethe|lorajethe]] || [[word:lorajeje|lorajeje]] || [[word:lorajeshe|lorajeshe]] || [[word:lorajeke|lorajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lorajothotho|lorajothotho]] || [[word:lorajojojo|lorajojojo]] || [[word:lorajoshosho|lorajoshosho]] || [[word:lorajokoko|lorajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lorajotho|lorajotho]] || [[word:lorajojo|lorajojo]] || [[word:lorajosho|lorajosho]] || [[word:lorajoko|lorajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lorajofthof|lorajofthof]] || [[word:lorajofjof|lorajofjof]] || [[word:lorajofshof|lorajofshof]] || [[word:lorajofkof|lorajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfthÃŸf|lorajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfjÃŸf|lorajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfshÃŸf|lorajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfkÃŸf|lorajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lorajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lorajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lorajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lorajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfthÃŸf|lorajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfjÃŸf|lorajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfshÃŸf|lorajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfkÃŸf|lorajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfthÃŸf|lorajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfjÃŸf|lorajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfshÃŸf|lorajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lorajÃŸfkÃŸf|lorajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lorajÃḊthÃḊ|lorajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lorajÃḊjÃḊ|lorajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lorajÃḊshÃḊ|lorajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lorajÃḊkÃḊ|lorajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lorajathatha|lorajathatha]] || [[word:lorajajaja|lorajajaja]] || [[word:lorajashasha|lorajashasha]] || [[word:lorajakaka|lorajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lorajatha|lorajatha]] || [[word:lorajaja|lorajaja]] || [[word:lorajasha|lorajasha]] || [[word:lorajaka|lorajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lorajafthaf|lorajafthaf]] || [[word:lorajafjaf|lorajafjaf]] || [[word:lorajafshaf|lorajafshaf]] || [[word:lorajafkaf|lorajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lorajasha|lorajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lorajshÃḋasha|lorajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lorajroasha|lorajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lorajmuasha|lorajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lorajyaasha|lorajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golorajnkshÃḋasha|golorajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golorajnkroasha|golorajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golorajnkmuasha|golorajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golorajnkyaasha|golorajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lorarajasha|lorarajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lorarajshÃḋasha|lorarajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lorarajroasha|lorarajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lorarajmuasha|lorarajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lorarajyaasha|lorarajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golorarajnkshÃḋasha|golorarajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golorarajnkroasha|golorarajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golorarajnkmuasha|golorarajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golorarajnkyaasha|golorarajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lerÃḊjasha|lerÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lerÃḊjshÃḋasha|lerÃḊjshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lerÃḊjroasha|lerÃḊjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lerÃḊjmuasha|lerÃḊjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lerÃḊjyaasha|lerÃḊjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golerÃḊjnkshÃḋasha|golerÃḊjnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golerÃḊjnkroasha|golerÃḊjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golerÃḊjnkmuasha|golerÃḊjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golerÃḊjnkyaasha|golerÃḊjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lorfajasha|lorfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lorfajshÃḋasha|lorfajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lorfajroasha|lorfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lorfajmuasha|lorfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lorfajyaasha|lorfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golorfajnkshÃḋasha|golorfajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golorfajnkroasha|golorfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golorfajnkmuasha|golorfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golorfajnkyaasha|golorfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
